Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Confirm Entitlement To Estate Assets; Petition For Final Distribution; Second And Final Report On Waiver Of Account;...
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Continued To Jul-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Espey for Kent Webster (Executor).

Ms. Espey stated that notice was given to the Franchise Tax Board on September 15, 2012, that they have not located a Trust, that everything from the Decedent's desk came to her office and that the Decedent stated that she had no documents when assisting her with preparation of the will/estate planning. Ms. Espey also stated that she contacted the Decedents Friends/Witnesses and from what they could tell she did not have an Attorney, that she does not know if there is a schedule A, that property was held in joint tenancy, that there are no transfer of deeds and that there are no objections. In addition, Ms. Espey stated that the Husband had five Children/one predeceased, that the pour over will does not clearly show who the Beneficiaries would have been and that the Husband's estate has not commenced yet. The Court granted distribution of half of the assets. The fees are taken under submission. Counsel is to prepare a proposed order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)
